title: Peanut seed sterilization and germination
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e2556","text":"Treatments of peanut seeds with HgCl2 and fungicide Abound","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: In a Clean Bench in room 332, put In a sterile flask, add 150 mL, 0.1% Hg2Cl sterilized 0.1% Hg 2 Cl solution and shake occasionally for 00:07:00 .
Remove the Hg 2 Cl by pouring it to a specific biohazard collection container.
Rinse the seeds 3 times with 150 mL, ddH2O for 00:05:00 each with constant shaking.Collect the rinse water to water waste bottle.
Prepare Abound Flowable Fungicide Syngenta by adding 0.6 mL, fungicide in 100 mL, ddH2O , add the diluted fungicide to the flask. Soak the seeds in the fungicide for 00:03:00 with frequent shaking.
Remove the fungicide by pouring it to a specific biohazard collection container.
Rinse the seeds 3 times with 150 mL, ddH2O for 00:05:00 each with constant shaking.Collect the rinse water to water waste bottle.
Add ddH2O to the flask until the seeds are fully merged. Put it in dark growth chamber 26 °C for 48:00:00 .
Pour out the ddH2O, and put the seeds in a germination box
creator: Ziliang Luo
